BodyTemplate:
Hello {{PatientName}},

Your appointment has been confirmed.

  • Doctor: Dr. {{DoctorName}}
  • Date: {{AppointmentDate}}
  • Time: {{StartTime}}
  • Confirmation #: {{ConfirmationNumber}}

Please arrive 10 minutes early. Thank you for choosing HMS.
Appointment confirmed with Dr. {{DoctorName}} on {{AppointmentDate}} at {{StartTime}}. Ref: {{ConfirmationNumber}}

Hello {{PatientName}},

We regret to inform you that your appointment has been cancelled.

  • Doctor: Dr. {{DoctorName}}
  • Date: {{AppointmentDate}}
  • Time: {{StartTime}}

Please contact us to reschedule. We apologize for any inconvenience.
Your appointment with Dr. {{DoctorName}} on {{AppointmentDate}} at {{StartTime}} has been cancelled. Please contact HMS to reschedule.

Hello {{PatientName}},

This is a friendly reminder that you have an appointment tomorrow.

  • Doctor: Dr. {{DoctorName}}
  • Date: {{AppointmentDate}}
  • Time: {{StartTime}}
  • Confirmation #: {{ConfirmationNumber}}

Please ensure you arrive on time. See you soon!
Reminder: Appointment with Dr. {{DoctorName}} tomorrow at {{StartTime}}. Ref: {{ConfirmationNumber}}

Dear Dr. {{DoctorName}},

A critical lab result requires your immediate attention.

  • Patient: {{PatientName}}
  • Test: {{TestName}}
  • Result: {{ResultValue}}
  • Normal Range: {{NormalRange}}

Please review and take appropriate action as soon as possible.

Hello {{PatientName}},

Your prescription for {{MedicationName}} is expiring on {{ExpiryDate}}.

Please contact your doctor to arrange a renewal before the expiry date to avoid any interruption in your treatment.
Reminder: Your prescription for {{MedicationName}} expires on {{ExpiryDate}}. Contact your doctor to renew.

Hello {{PatientName}},

Your invoice has been issued. Please find the details below.

  • Invoice #: {{InvoiceNumber}}
  • Total Amount: {{TotalAmount}} EGP
  • Due Date: {{DueDate}}

The invoice PDF is attached to this email. Please make payment before the due date.

Thank you for choosing HMS.

Hello {{PatientName}},

We have received your payment. Thank you!

  • Invoice #: {{InvoiceNumber}}
  • Amount Paid: {{AmountPaid}} EGP
  • Payment Date: {{PaidAt}}

Your account balance has been updated accordingly. Thank you for choosing HMS.

Hello {{PatientName}},

Your invoice is overdue and requires immediate attention.

  • Invoice #: {{InvoiceNumber}}
  • Total Amount: {{TotalAmount}} EGP
  • Due Date: {{DueDate}}
  • Outstanding Balance: {{OutstandingBalance}} EGP

Please make payment as soon as possible to avoid further action. Contact us if you need assistance.
